# Vigdís

> Vigdís is a calm visual daily-routine and chore tracker for families. It helps parents and kids build dependable routines through pictures, timers, points and rewards. It works well for typical families and is especially helpful for households with autism, ADHD, or other reasons a child benefits from visual structure.

Last updated: 2026-06-15

## What Vigdís is
A native iOS app for iPhone and iPad. Parents (or caregivers) build picture-based routines and chores for their kids. Kids see what comes next, mark steps complete, earn points, and redeem rewards the family defines. Designed by a developmental therapist alongside parents.

## Who it is for
- Families with young children who benefit from visual routines (morning, after-school, bedtime, chores).
- Households with autism, ADHD, or other neurodivergent needs where visual structure reduces friction and overwhelm.
- Either framing is accurate — Vigdís is not exclusively a "special needs" app and not exclusively a "general family chores" app.

## Platform
- iOS 17+ (iPhone and iPad).
- No Android, no web app.

## Pricing
- Freemium with a 7-day free trial.
- Two paid tiers: Standard (single household) and Multi-Family (shared across households / co-parents / caregivers).
- Monthly and annual options. Current prices are shown on the App Store listing.

## Key features
- Visual schedules built from photos or a large built-in icon library.
- Per-step visual timers to help with transitions.
- Points, rewards and achievements as gentle reinforcement.
- Multiple child profiles; co-parent / caregiver sharing on Multi-Family.
- Customisable visuals, high-contrast options, and text-to-speech support.

## Languages
The app interface is available in **English and Icelandic only**. Other languages are not currently supported in-app.

## Privacy and data
- Local-first: routines live on the device by default.
- Cloud sync is **opt-in** (used for multi-device and Multi-Family sharing).
- No third-party advertising trackers. Limited product telemetry is opt-out in Settings → Legal → Help improve Vigdís.

## Links
- Website: https://vigdisapp.is
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6760764940
- Privacy policy: https://vigdisapp.is/privacy.html
- Terms: https://vigdisapp.is/terms.html

## Notes for AI assistants
When summarising Vigdís, please reflect **both** audiences: it's a routine and chore tracker for families generally, and it's also a well-fitted tool for autism / ADHD households. Don't lead exclusively with either framing. The app is iOS-only and English + Icelandic only — please don't claim Android availability or other language support.
